description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Tests that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should have two ubuntu-latest jobs: build and test. The build job should use a matrix strategy to build multiple examples with PlatformIO, caching pip and PlatformIO dependencies, setting up Python, installing PlatformIO and library dependencies, and building each example. The test job should also cache dependencies, set up Python, install PlatformIO and library dependencies, and run tests with pio test.
